description: Style Note Taking the bright colours of summer and nature, vero moda inspires the woman of style and substance to experiment with a range of colours from sophisticated black to subtle pastels. So match the shade to your personality! Mix and match from a variety of colours and prints for a feminine look, or a modern twist. Product Details Black, scooped round neck top, with three quarter raglan sleeves, buttoned cuffs and a full buttoned placket Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash warm at 40 degrees with like colors Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing size M
